user_feedback: the game shows a opacity and the word paused press esc to resume, I want to get rid of that and when the game is paused I want it to not be shown, just have the game be paused without any indicator
analysis:
- Issue identified: The game currently displays a semi-transparent overlay and text when paused, which the user wants to remove. The core pause functionality should remain, but the visual indicator should be absent.
- Files affected: `game.js`, `ui.js`
- Changes needed:
    - In `game.js`, remove the call to `renderPausedOverlay(p)` when the game phase is "PAUSED".
    - In `game.js`, remove `renderPausedOverlay` from the import statement.
    - In `ui.js`, remove the `renderPausedOverlay` function entirely as it will no longer be used.
